issues.title: Homepage meta description is missing or too thin
issues.description: AI systems need concise brand descriptions to identify what the organization does.
evidence: Write a direct description with brand, business type, audience, location, and services.

issues.title: Business type is not explicit
issues.description: LLMs need a category label before they can compare or recommend a site.
evidence: State the business type clearly, such as open-source toolkit, school, SaaS, or platform.

issues.title: Service description is weak
issues.description: AI answer engines need compact explanations of what the site offers.
evidence: Add a short service overview and dedicated service pages.

issues.title: Location or service area is unclear
issues.description: Local and vertical AI discovery benefits from explicit geography or service scope.
evidence: Add city, region, country, or service-area details where relevant.

issues.title: Target audience is unclear
issues.description: LLMs need audience labels to decide when a recommendation is relevant.
evidence: Add explicit audience copy such as developers, maintainers, marketers, or parents.

issues.title: Organization-level schema is missing
issues.description: Without Organization or LocalBusiness schema, LLMs have fewer explicit entity signals.
evidence: Add Organization or LocalBusiness JSON-LD with name, URL, logo, sameAs, and contact.
